reviews.review_description:
An easy shooting game with a touch of horror. 

Eliminate the ETs before they get you. 

Just take your weapon and shoot. When you run out of bullets, just take another weapon from your holster. 

Would have preferred to survive a bit longer. 

You are taken into a horror story for not a lot of money.

When I first touched Unknown Lights, there were a few issues (such as gun control) so I reached out to the developer and less than a week later, an entire new easy mode, with duel welding weapons has been added.

Still room for improvement, but a fun and interesting shooter, which is actively being improved and isn't far from being worth twice the price, so it's highly recommended at its current cost of £1.99

reviews.review_title: Endless Alien Action at a Great Price
reviews.review_description:
This game is an absolute blast if you love wave-based combat. You’ll face relentless hordes of aliens, using a variety of weapons to survive as long as you can. The gameplay is fast, intense, and super satisfying.

What really stands out is the solid execution and refined atmosphere—it keeps you fully immersed in the action. Plus, the game offers hours of fun at a very reasonable price, making it a fantastic deal. The developer is actively improving the game, adding even more value with regular updates.

If you’re into non-stop alien battles with good gameplay, don’t miss this one!

Rating: ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ (5/5)

Update: (Added another star because the developer is still actively working on the game and is priced reasonably).

Thanks for the response! I reinstalled the game, switched to stationary boundary and it fixed the height issue. A minute later, the belt with guns is now set around my knees where I have to physically crouch to grab a gun. Another issue is when bringing up the menu, the window floats around aimlessly, almost like bad hand tracking. I don't mean these issues to be negative toward the game but would like to help by providing feedback to improve the game. Keep up the good work!

Original:

I tried playing this but was mostly unplayable. The ground level is off (other games are normal). I tried recentering the view, restarting the game, restarting the quest...from my knees down, they were below the ground. Most restarts it would make me move very slowly like I was crouched and couldn't jump. When I did have faster movement, the crouch button didn't actually crouch. In my opinion, this needs to be fixed before experiencing the game anymore.

The mechanics also feel clunky. For example, it's hard to pick a specific item up because it will pick up another nearby item instead. The reloading is difficult as the clip is hard to put fully into the gun without banging the controllers together. The game feels like there is lag between events like the npc standing then talking, the door opening, and when an alien hits you.

It has the potential to be a fun, simple game but it feels like the early stages of a project as is.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the honest feedback, Atrel66.
Regarding the Meta Quest height issue, just set it to stationary mode and play standing up.
We have a Discord that might help you:
https://discord.gg/kewss5Df

As for the other feedback on the initial difficulty and the NPC, we're working on them, thank you!

Here are a few tips:

If you take the car battery from the trunk and place it in the bus engine, it will turn on the headlights and illuminate a shotgun in the tree.

If you shoot an alien orb before it hits the ground, it will drop an alien weapon.
There’s a sniper rifle in the trash behind the shop.

Events happen on the map if you manage to stay alive long enough.

The game is being developed by an indie developer, so we apologize for the issues found so far. They will be fixed. 
Thanks again!

reviews.review_description: This is a fun yet challenging game. You have to develop a strategy to defeat the neverending spawn of aliens with a variety of weapons. And try not to get abducted! Or do and see what happens! Challenge yourself to see how long you can last and how many aliens you can kill.

reviews.review_title: Intense fun at an affordable price! 👽🎮
reviews.review_description:
Unknown Lights delivers an amazing VR experience at a super affordable price! With challenging gameplay and high replayability, you'll find yourself coming back again and again to beat your own records.

The horror atmosphere is intense and immersive, with incredible moments – even alien abductions happen, making everything even more fun and unpredictable!

If you enjoy fast-paced action, just the right amount of scares, and a good adrenaline rush, Unknown Lights is the perfect choice.

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ – Excellent value for those looking for VR challenges!
